title: Established as An-Najah Nabulsi School
description: An-Najah was established as a primary school (An-Najah Nabulsi School), educating students from Palestine and abroad.

title: Intermediate university degrees
description: An-Najah became a teacher preparation institute and granted intermediate university degrees in various fields.

title: Chartered as An-Najah National University
description: An-Najah evolved into a full-fledged university, “An-Najah National University,” initially with Faculties of Arts and Sciences.

title: Engineering and other faculties inaugurated
description: Faculties of Economics, Administrative Sciences, Educational Sciences and Engineering were inaugurated.

title: Faculty of Pharmacy established
description: Faculty of Pharmacy established along with new centres including APSIM and the Water and Environmental Studies Institute.

title: Faculty of Medicine established
description: Established in cooperation with Al-Quds and Al-Azhar Universities.

title: New Campus foundation stone laid
description: Late Yasser Arafat laid the foundation stone for the New Campus. Faculty of Veterinary Medicine and Computer Engineering also established.

title: New Campus inaugurated by President Abbas
description: President Mahmoud Abbas inaugurated the New Campus. Faculty of Honors and Architectural Conservation unit established.

title: Teaching hospital and sports complex
description: Faculty of Medicine accredited independently. University hospital acquired and sports complex inaugurated.

title: EFQM Global Excellence Award
description: University obtains the EFQM Global Excellence Award.

title: ABET accreditation for engineering
description: Seven engineering programmes received ABET accreditation, a first in Palestine.

title: Ranked 1st in Palestine
description: Ranked 1st Palestinian university by Webometrics and U.S. News. Two additional ABET accreditations obtained.
